scripts.frontend: bun copy-i18n && bun run logo && cd frontend && bun dev
scripts.dev: NO_LOGO=true concurrently "bun run frontend" "bun run backend"
scripts.build: bun copy-i18n && bun copy-docker && bun run logo && cd frontend && bun run build
scripts.preview: bun copy-i18n && bun run logo && cd frontend && bun run preview
scripts.astro: bun copy-i18n && bun run logo && cd frontend && bun run astro
